subcodes.first_line: O thou who strivest in the services of the divine Cause, all thy labours, hardships, trials, difficulties and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساعی در خدمات امر الهی جمیع زحمات و مشقات و متاعب و مصاعب و مصائب آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
